text_en: It is quite common to feel overwhelmed when you are navigating the complexities of English. Sometimes, advanced grammar or a sea of new vocabulary can make you feel lost again, but you should remember that this is a natural part of the journey. Feeling confused is actually a positive sign because it shows that you are pushing your boundaries and growing. Instead of worrying, try to focus on manageable steps. For instance, you could practice by writing a single line, reading a short paragraph, or speaking just one sentence every day. These small but consistent efforts will eventually guide you back on track. Success in language learning doesn't happen overnight; it requires a mix of patience, practice, and persistence. So, the next time you feel stuck, just take a deep breath and keep moving forward—you are doing better than you think!
